extension.description: Flash the local Windows VS Code taskbar window from workspace notifications without stealing focus.
command.testFlash.title: Window Flash Notify: Test UI Flash
command.diagnoseWindows.title: Window Flash Notify: Diagnose Windows Targeting
command.installRelay.title: Window Flash Notify: Install Relay in Remote Window
command.selectSound.title: Window Flash Notify: Select Notification Sound
command.clearSound.title: Window Flash Notify: Clear Notification Sound
command.testSound.title: Window Flash Notify: Test Notification Sound
configuration.title: Window Flash Notify
configuration.flashUntilForeground.descr: Flash the taskbar until the VS Code window becomes foreground.
configuration.flashCount.description: Number of flashes to request when windowFlashNotify.flashUntilForeground is disabled.
configuration.soundEnabled.description: Play a Windows notification sound after receiving a notification request unless the request overrides sound.
configuration.customSoundPath.descriptio: Optional local Windows .wav file path for notification sounds. Use the Select Notification Sound command to copy a WAV file into extension storage.
configuration.showToast.description: Also show a Windows toast notification. Clicking it attempts to focus the original VS Code window through a VS Code URI.
configuration.toastTimeout.description: Windows toast expiration timeout in seconds. Set to 0 to leave the toast expiration unset.
configuration.autoInstallRelay.descripti: Prompt to install or update the workspace-side relay extension when this UI extension is running in a remote window.
